word: G2558 - κακουχέω - kakouchéō - kak-oo-kheh'-o - Which suffer adversity

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κακουχέω

- Transliteration: Kakoucheo

- Phonetic: kak-oo-kheh'-o

- Definition:

1. to treat ill, oppress, plague

- Origin: from a presumed compound of G2556 and G2192

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From a presumed compound of G2556 and G2192; to maltreat: - which suffer adversity torment.
